programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: Laceys husband assists the pair in cracking down on a crooked construction firm that is responsible for the death of a worker

programme.title: Starsky 302
programme.desc: Starsky 302

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: While visiting a friend Hawke excuses himself to get a cup of coffee In his absence his friend and the secretary are executed mob style Hawke is shot but manages to escape Santini Air is ravaged in a search for something that as yet has not been disclosed A bug is found in the phone at Santini Air and is immediately destroyed Somehow the villains still manage to track Hawke to the place he is hiding After meeting with Archangel Hawke learns his friend was a double agent Hawke was given a ticket to a local art show which his friend gave him refusing to take no for an answer It is discovered that his ticket stub contains a micro dot with top secret blueprints Again the villains somehow know that he is at that art show without being told and also know his ticket stub contains the micro dot During Hawkes and his female friends escape she secretly drops the stub into the drawing box for a giveaway that was to occur at the end of the show Both proceed to Airwolf where they hastily eliminate the baddies

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki is terrorized by two men looking for a cursed lantern taken from them that has the power to find buried treasure

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Song of the Gringo
programme.desc: Several miners are killed and their mines are confiscated by a mysterious person Tex an undercover cop is asked to investigate the murders However Tex ends up being implicated as a criminal

programme.title: 3 10 to Yuma
programme.desc: 3 10 to Yuma

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: A new female neighbor makes a bad impression on Grampa by being better than him at almost everything

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Luke is set up by a traveling show to take part in a boxing match Kate objects which leaves Grandpa to defend the McCoy family honor

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.desc: Rifleman 423

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: fter work Joe Friday goes by a laundromat to buy cigarettes He interrupts a burglar stealing from the coin box and shots are fired The burglar dies and Friday is investigated by the shooting board to see if it is a justified shot

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Kimble returns to his hometown where he reunites with his father John and his loving sister Donna who absolutely believe in his innocence but Kimbles brother Ray has serious doubts about him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A housewife stressed out by her husbands reckless behavior welcomes an elderly cosmetics saleswoman in to her home Only to discover that the old hag has another more devious motive

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: hen funeral director Ezra Thornberry gets his very polite young nephew Bobby as a roommate he eventually learns his rude harsh behavior towards him could be fatal

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Down on his luck yuppie Richard Shepard crashes at his buddy Carls swanky seaside abode after he gets thrown out of his home by his fed-up wife Eleanor Richard develops a strong bond with a mysterious large white dog who not only becomes his new best friend but also kills anyone who angers Richard

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Struggling writer Jeffrey Hunt fakes his own death in order to achieve literary immortality His unfaithful wife Debby has been having an adulterous affair with Jeffreys publicist and best friend Tony Lynch Debby and Tony try to make Jeffreys staged death real but the plan backfires

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: A rancher comes after Eric when he befriends a she-wolf who earlier had attacked the rancher for killing her wolf pups

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: While working as a grounds keeper on a large estate owned by a kindly old lady she is brutally murdered in her own home Both her granddaughter and granddaughters husband implicate Eric But Eric knows he didnt do it and knows who did

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: After Natalies brother is fatally wounded by a gunman she prevails upon Nick to turn him into a vampire giving him eternal life

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki is terrorized by two men looking for a cursed lantern taken from them that has the power to find buried treasure

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A groom to be gets a lesson in monogamy from the stripper from hell at his bachelor party and then his bride is overwhelmed with suspicion and mistrust and busts married men who cheat due to having caught her father step-out on mom when she was a child

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys are struggling financially so Pepino secretly gets a job moonlighting as a singer at the El Tippi-Tin

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Little Lukes hopes of having his brother as his relay-race partner are dashed when Grampa steps in to take Lukes place

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ enlists an unlikely ally in his effort to bring down Rutherford T Grant after the crooked captain frames a bank robbery on Samantha Stacks and Angie Final episode of the series

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and his neighbor Roger are banished to the barn by their wives

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is stolen and hidden in a sorority house basement Its Wilbur dressed in drag to the rescue

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Tiger a female underground agent is arrested while trying to document some secret German bases and is held in Paris for questioning So Hogan and LeBeau become stowaways aboard Klinks staff car and head for Paris to free her

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: While trying to free the underground agent Tiger in Paris Hogan must seek help from a Parisian fortune teller and also enlist the aid of a man who is a look-alike for Nazi Police Chief Heinrich Himmler!

programme.title: Mchale 226
programme.desc: Mchale 226

programme.title: Mchale 314
programme.desc: Mchale 314

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter asks Gomer to take his place on a date

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carters adopted Korean daughter arrives-but shes not the little girl he remembers

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A lost crate containing a top-secret clay that can be converted to explosives washes up on the island Not knowing what it is they make several items with it--including Gilligans new tooth fillings

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The pilot episode that tells the tale of a tiny ship which set off on a three-hour tour but got caught in a storm and beached on an island The pilot was filmed in November 1963 and not aired until almost 30 years later

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: At the haunted house recently purchased by the Harts weird friends Fred and Amanda a dinner party turns into a deadly treasure hunt

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Michael balks when Mr Vanderkellen demands he sign a prenuptial agreement feeling it indicates a lack of trust on Stephanies part Meanwhile Dick breaks an irreplaceable music box given to the Vanderkellens by Winston Churchill

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick is saddled with a perky co-host he doesnt want; Larry Darryl and Darryl name their pet pig after Stephanie

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Needing a new washing machine and not having the money and refusing to put anything on credit MacGillis moonlights with Holowachuk at a rest stop station where Gene is the manager and John is the assistant manager

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways try to contact two astronauts in a space capsule orbiting over the island but they fail However they may get a second chance when an unmanned capsule they are trying to make contact with lands on the island

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch and Ryan go undercover as a gigolo and a wealthy widow to entrap a group of robbers But they enjoy their roles so much that they almost forget the reason for it until its too late

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou plans an elaborate sting operation to infiltrate a cult but everything goes awry when the new guys arent prepared and Matt is left picking up the pieces

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team gets back to work but have their anger management sessions had any effect Sonia and Lyndah confront a gang of roller derby girls whove got the skills to protect their car

programme.title: The Flight Of The Phoenix
programme.desc: After an oil company plane crashes in the Sahara the survivors are buoyed with hope by one of the passengers an airplane designer who plans for them to build a flyable plane from the wreckage

programme.title: Mozambique 1964
programme.desc: An out-of-work and penniless American pilot is offered work in Mozambique and promptly becomes an unwitting pawn in a world of drug smuggling kidnap and murder

programme.title: Hercules 214
programme.desc: Hercules 214

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Taelon shuttle is shot down over Antarctica There are Jiridians aboard but two of the passengers escape When Augur discovers Lilis blood on the ship he is convinced that she is not dead

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A noted scientist and old friend of Suzannes Dr Erik Von Deer is being brain-washed through signals subliminally implanted in the music of his favorite artist into secretly working on a serum that will give the aliens immunity to Earths bacteria Suzanne arrives for a weekend visit while Von Deer is on the verge of the serums completion

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: When a ship carrying a prisoner lands at Moonbase Alpha after asking for assistance Maya insists that the prisoner is a poet and not a murderer and releases him

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke get jobs hauling wrecked cars to demolition derby operator Augie Detweiller unaware he and Boss have schemed to hide stolen engines under the hood When they are suspected of smuggling the stolen engines into Hazzard Bo agrees to become a driver in an upcoming event to find out the truth

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A 15-year-old runaway girl comes to the apartment of the father she hasnt seen in years only to find a man dead inside When she finds out her father is not the dead man but possibly the killer she still continues to search for him not knowing that he is also being hunted by the brother of the dead man who plans to kill him

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An elderly cardinal has been taken prisoner in a fictional Eastern European country because the clergyman is the leader of the political opposition The IMF force is tasked with freeing him from the inescapable prison

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An informant known as Black Ten turns Friday and Gannon onto a known burglar who is trying to sell an expensive ring that had been reported as stolen They enlist the aid of a policewoman just out of the academy to help them undercover

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a girl mysteriously disappears from school Friday and Gannon try to find her and they find out that there are more questions than answers One question is was she abducted by a man named Harper

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble works as a laundryman for an amiable fellow named Charlie who knows too much about the wrong people who are out to kill him He has arranged for his girlfriend to come join him not realizing she may bring the Mob with her

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A handsome stranger saves Audras life during a horse stampede and she quickly becomes attached to him unaware of his involvement in a series of robberies in the Valley

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne comes to the aid of a woman but finds she has double-crossed him He tracks her down finding her a owner of a herd of cattle being driven to Kansas He joins drive as a hand but his expertise may bring him a big payday

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Empress Interview
programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Annalisa Guidone Interview
programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: The Brian Stanley Interview
programme.desc: The master writer and producer Mr Brian Stanley returns to the Sherard Show to talk about his upcoming film and play

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: By using a lock of Audrics hair Saw Boss creates a clone which tricks Jayce into a trap Gillian suspects the truth and convinces Jayce to leave the root behind as a precaution Jayce is captured and a clone of Jayce is sent back for the root

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Computer calculations give Zartan Omega as the probable location of Audric This planet is covered with blue light from the red dwarf sun and grows only giant flowers Upon reaching it though they discover Monster Minds have set up a satellite

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM has a drilling vehicle called The Magma Mole that they are using to burrow beneath Tokyo to create devastating floods
